summary: Every visible in-scope requirement is satisfied at current trunk HEAD e37dc2e7e. The original ContainerJob implementation is present, and merge 3b4f7c166 (PR #3289) closed the brief's remaining verification gaps by adding Temporal test-server workflow-boundary and replay coverage plus controlling lifecycle tests. Merge da1143f96 (PR #3302) subsequently recorded the #3277 assessment. No code work is needed.

requirements.description: Provide the versioned MoonMind.ContainerJob workflow with compact contracts, typed Activity boundaries, existing-fleet registration, and stable asynchronous start-or-attach identity.

Provide deterministic ownership and publication tokens, timeout and cancellation finalization, monotonic projection sequencing, and separation of primary outcome from publication and cleanup diagnostics.
Provide ContainerJob Temporal test-server workflow-boundary execution and replay coverage.

Provide controlling tests for cancellation during acquisition, running, and publication; timeout stop/evidence/cleanup ordering; auxiliary publication/cleanup failures; and authoritative terminal projection evidence.
